parsed_output.justification: Justin claims to be the Seer and identifies Mitchell as a werewolf, but later contradicts himself by claiming he saw two villagers in the center; a Seer can only perform one of these actions. Dan also claims to be the Seer and provides a consistent account of seeing Caitlynn (the Troublemaker) move. Caitlynn confirms she swapped Justin and Mitchell. If Justin was the Werewolf and was swapped with Mitchell, Mitchell is now the Werewolf. If Justin was the Seer and Mitchell was the Werewolf, and they were swapped, Justin would now be the Werewolf, but Justin's contradictory claims make it more likely he was the original Werewolf.

If Justin was the Seer and Mitchell was the Werewolf, and they were swapped, Justin would now be the Werewolf, but Justin's contradictory claims make it more likely he was the original Werewolf.
